query_title: The Ouija Experiment 2: Theatre of Death

recommendations.title: Ouija
recommendations.overview: A group of friends must confront their most terrifying fears when they awaken the dark powers of an ancient spirit board.

recommendations.title: Witchboard
recommendations.overview: Playing around with a Ouija board, a trio of friends succeeds in contacting the spirit of a young boy. Trouble begins when the evil spirit, Malfeitor, takes over one of their bodies.

recommendations.title: The Telephone Box
recommendations.overview: A man gets trapped inside a telephone box and nobody is able to free him.

recommendations.title: The Legend of Hei
recommendations.overview: When cat spirit Luo Xiaohei's home is deforested by humans, he must find a new one. He runs into a group of other spirit creatures who take him under their wing with dreams of reconquering the land they say is rightfully theirs. However, they run int

recommendations.title: Hocus Pocus 2
recommendations.overview: 29 years since the Black Flame Candle was last lit, the 17th-century Sanderson sisters are resurrected, and they are looking for revenge. Now it's up to three high school students to stop the ravenous witches from wreaking a new kind of havoc on Sale

recommendations.title: Death Whisperer
recommendations.overview: When a remote village is plagued by a deadly curse, one brother must fight to save his family from a terrifying supernatural threat.

recommendations.title: Willy's Wonderland
recommendations.overview: When his car breaks down, a quiet loner agrees to clean an abandoned family fun center in exchange for repairs. He soon finds himself waging war against possessed animatronic mascots while trapped inside Willy's Wonderland.

recommendations.title: Night of the Living Dead
recommendations.overview: In this remake of the classic 1968 film, a group of people are trapped inside a farmhouse as legions of the walking dead try to get inside and use them for food.

recommendations.title: Ring 0
recommendations.overview: Taking place thirty years before the events of Ringu, Ringu 0 provides the shocking background story of how the girl on the video became a deadly, vengeful spirit.

recommendations.title: Demons
recommendations.overview: A group of people are trapped in a West Berlin movie theater infested with ravenous demons who proceed to kill and possess the humans one-by-one, thereby multiplying their numbers.
